name: Wild Rumble
short_description: Wild Rumble is a 3v3 roguelike soccer game in which you'll evolve your team as you score goals through dangerous arenas. Unlock new characters, master their abilities and pick the best upgrades to lead your team to victory!
detailed_description:
Dive into the roguelike soccer experience that is Wild Rumble as you score goals through dangerours arenas on your mission to defeat the evil Soccer King!

⚽BUILD YOUR DREAM TEAM

Choose from a diverse roster of characters, each with unique stats and powerful abilities to find the combination that best suits your play style.

⚽EVOLVE YOUR PLAYERS

After each match you'll be able to select an upgrade that will benefit your team. Choose the best ones and create powerful synergies to maximize their potential.

⚽PLAY. LOSE. IMPROVE. REPEAT.

Every match is different than the previous. Different opponents, maps, upgrades and new opportunities to try new team compositions.

⚽6 PLAYER MULTIPLAYER

Play with 3 of your friends using Steam remote play or up to 6 locally. Dive into the Roguelike Campaign for a thrilling experience or enjoy single matches in the Quickplay mode!
